title: gentiana pumila subsp. delphinensis
intro: Gentiana pumila subsp. delphinensis, also known as Dwarf Gentian, is a small alpine plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gentiana pumila subsp. delphinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, or extracts, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
